style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with slow drifting mist particles that leave faint afterimages, shadows elongating unnaturally around the body like liquid smoke; cold blue-white ghost luminescence pulses through its translucent skin, casting distorted reflections in nearby still water; eerie purple light casts elongated, shifting shadows across the ground in a moonlit swamp setting. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
